stemHtml:
For IFR flights, under which circumstances is flight above a congested area permitted?

1. When 1000 ft clearance within 8 km of the highest terrain applies
2. In order to land at an aerodrome
3. When authorised by the applicable authority
4. When conducting a training flight with an instructor
5. At an altitude allowing a safe landing without undue hazard to persons or property on the surface
6. With 8 km visibility and 1000 ft distance from clouds
7. When taking off from an aerodrome
